channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: LeBron James calls out 'lame' Browns fans who booed Deshaun Watson following injury
item.description: LeBron James called out Cleveland Browns fans for booing injured quarterback Deshaun Watson, saying they were "lame" on a social media post.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: New York Liberty win first WNBA championship, beating Minnesota 67-62 in OT
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — As confetti fell and Frank Sinatra’s “New York, New York” blared through the arena, the New York Liberty celebrated the end of a long odyssey.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Minnesota Lynx head coach says WNBA title was 'stolen from us' in scathing remarks about referees
item.description: Minnesota Lynx head coach Cheryl Reeve blasted officials after losing the WNBA title, saying that the championship was "stolen from us.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Tiger Woods to make TGL indoor league debut the 2nd week of the season after NFL wild-card weekend
item.description: Tiger Woods makes his debut in the second week of the indoor TMRW Golf League, part of a schedule released Monday that has the six teams wrapping up the inaugural season on ESPN two weeks before the Masters.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Woman runs onto Steelers' field with pro-Trump sign as former president attends game
item.description: With former President Donald Trump in attendance, a woman ran onto the field during Sunday night's Pittsburgh Steelers-New York Jets game with a pro-Trump sign.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 49ers report card: Punchless offense, porous run defense key another loss to Chiefs
item.description: The 49ers fell to 3-4 as their offense loses more players and their defense fails again to thwart the Chiefs and Patrick Mahomes.
item.dc:creator: Cam Inman, The Mercury News

item.title: AP Top 25: Oregon is No. 1 for first time since 2012; Vanderbilt enters poll and Michigan drops out
item.description: Oregon became the fourth team this season to hold the No. 1 ranking in The Associated Press college football poll, moving into the top spot on Sunday for the first time in 12 years after Texas lost at home to Georgia. Vanderbilt made its first appearance since the 2013 season, at No.
item.dc:creator: ERIC OLSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: AP Top 25 Extra Points: As 4th team to reach No. 1 this season, Oregon's rise is sign of the times
item.description: Never mind that a faction of fans lament college sports' transition from amateurism to above-board professionalism. This football season is delivering when it comes to unpredictability and entertainment value. It's reflected week by week in The Associated Press college football poll.
item.dc:creator: ERIC OLSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Dodgers finish off Mets with 10-5 win in NLCS and advance to face Yankees in World Series
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Shohei Ohtani carried the injury-riddled Los Angeles Dodgers to baseball's best record during the regular season. Tommy Edman joined the team in late July and helped them reach the World Series. It's been that kind of year for the big-spending Dodgers.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Dodgers vs. Yankees in the World Series? It's more common than you think
item.description: The Fall Classic is set, and the matchup is a classic all right. The Los Angeles Dodgers clinched the National League pennant on Sunday, closing out the New York Mets in six games in the NL Championship Series. That means that baseball fans are getting a dream matchup in the World Series.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: New York wins first WNBA championship after falling in previous five appearances in the Finals
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The New York Liberty have their first WNBA championship after falling in the title round in their previous five appearances. An original franchise when the league tipped off in 1997, the Liberty have competed in a one-game, best-of-three and best-of-five format.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Andy Ludwig steps down as Utes offensive coordinator
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Following another dismal offensive performance against TCU, Andy Ludwig has stepped down as Utah's offensive coordinator and quarterbacks coach. Utah head coach Kyle Whittingham released a statement Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Patrick Mahomes and Chiefs stay undefeated, beat 49ers 28-18 in Super Bowl rematch
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — The formula might look a bit different with the defense and running game carrying the Kansas City Chiefs. But the results are awfully familiar as the two-time defending champions keep knocking off teams — especially the San Francisco 49ers.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Chiefs remain NFL's only undefeated team after taking down 49ers in Super Bowl rematch
item.description: The Chiefs ran their way to 4 touchdowns, including from Patrick Mahomes for the first time in 32 games, in a win over the 49ers as they met for the first time since the Super Bowl.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Browns QB Watson suffers likely season-ending Achilles injury. Teammates upset some fans cheered
item.description: Deshaun Watson's tumultuous tenure with Cleveland has taken another significant turn. His third season appears to be over.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: CMU def. New Mexico Highlands 21-10 in homecoming game
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—In the second quarter, with the game tied at zero, the Cowboys sought to break the deadlock. Joey Cave handed the ball off to Mike Jones, who found space after strong blocking from his teammates.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: CMU inducts BJ Russell into the Hall of Honor
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—Colorado Mesa University recently honored two former athletes, linebacker BJ Russell and volleyball setter Jordyn Moody, for their outstanding contributions to CMU athletics.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: USU gives up 21 points in fourth quarter, lose to New Mexico
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Utah State's losing streak hit six games, and this one was the most hearbreaking. Devon Dampier and Eli Sanders had touchdown runs in the final 3:53 to rally New Mexico to a 50-45 victory over Utah State on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Real Salt Lake legend reflects on his journey, leadership, and life beyond the pitch
item.description: Real Salt Lake legend and current Vancouver Whitecaps FC standout Damir Kreilach joins Royal Riot co-host Mattey Casey for an exclusive interview, just ahead of his much-anticipated return to America First Field.
item.dc:creator: Mattey Casey, ABC 4

item.title: Kucherov gets 4th goal of the season, Lightning beat Canucks 4-1 in Milton-delayed home opener
item.description: Nikita Kucherov scored his fourth goal of the season, and the Tampa Bay Lightning defeated the Vancouver Canucks in their hurricane-delayed home opener on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: San Diego Sockers release 2024-2025 season tickets and schedule
item.description: Season tickets and the full season schedule for the San Diego Sockers' 2024-2025 season are now available for fans to purchase.
item.dc:creator: Anna Ashcraft, Fox 5

item.title: The Super Bowl will return to Atlanta's Mercedes-Benz Stadium in 2028
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — The Super Bowl will return to Atlanta in 2028 at the home of the Falcons, following a vote of approval by NFL team owners on Tuesday at the league's annual fall meeting.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Jets acquire Raiders wide receiver Davante Adams, AP sources say
item.description: The New York Jets have agreed to terms to acquire disgruntled wide receiver Davante Adams from the Las Vegas Raiders, reuniting him with quarterback Aaron Rodgers, two people with knowledge of the deal told The Associated Press.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Caleb Williams and the Bears are looking good at their bye with 3 straight wins and a 4-2 mark
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Caleb Williams is settling into a rhythm, and the Bears are racking up wins. Overall, things are looking good for Chicago.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9
